name: Fast Clone Core
plugin params: population, IndEvo_SwitchablePopulation, aotd_capital_complex, patrolhq, militarybase, highcommand, aquaculture, aotd_fishing_harbour, farming, aotd_monoculture_plots, aotd_artisanal_farming, aotd_subsidised_farming, heavybatteries, grounddefenses
desc: A notorious Exodyne Biotechnology product able to unfold into a large culture cluster when installed. Its integrated genetic weaver can cultivate specific human templates to an owner's requirements, at least in theory. The safety locks have been cut away and rewritten by post-Collapse hands, leaving behind a device that would have violated several Human Domain statutes even before the Sector learned to lower its standards.
